emails.subject: Meter 1594 for Nov.
emails.body: Meter 1594 for Nov. We had flow on the first, prior to the shut in for work. I need a deal to pick up the 500 and change that squeaked through the meter, please. My exceptions need to be cleared pretty quickly. Thank you, Mary

emails.subject: Re: Meter 1594 for Nov.
emails.body: Re: Meter 1594 for Nov. Apply this volume to deal 101303. The point is on the ticket, but nothing was nom'd that day. D Mary Poorman@ENRON 11/29/2000 02:49 PM
